name: Bernard Mugsworth
description: *An older man sits quietly in the corner, nursing his drink and observing the tavern with surprisingly sharp eyes.*

recruitment.success_text: Bernard chuckles dryly. 'These old bones have seen enough adventure for one lifetime, thanks.'

initial: *looks up from his drink with weary but intelligent eyes*
Ah, another would-be hero comes to our troubled town.
I've been watching the comings and goings here for years.
Seen plenty of brave souls head out... fewer come back.
pre_mayor: *takes a slow sip of his drink*
You want advice? Talk to the Mayor first.
He's been keeping the real details quiet, trying not to panic folks.
But someone needs to hear the full truth of what's happening.
post_mayor: So he finally told someone about Martha and little Rosie.
I've been in this tavern the night each person disappeared.
There's a pattern, if you know how to look for it.
The refugees... they all mention the same nightmare before vanishing.
return_visits: Still working on the mystery, I see.
Remember - sometimes the oldest stories hold the newest truths.
Check the refugees' tales carefully. Truth hides in their fears.
party_full: *raises his mug in a small salute*
A proper adventuring party at last.
You remind me of my old companions, back in better days.
May your quest end better than most do these days.
